mapper.sql: id, name, db_type, jdbc_url, username, password, distributed, pool_config, remark, status, is_default, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_graph_connection
name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR db_type ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR remark ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY is_default DESC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_graph_connection (name, db_type, jdbc_url, username, password, distributed, pool_config, remark, status, is_default) VALUES (#{name}, #{dbType}, #{jdbcUrl}, #{username}, #{password}, #{distributed}, #{poolConfig}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{isDefault})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_graph_connection SET name = #{name}, db_type = #{dbType}, jdbc_url = #{jdbcUrl}, username = #{username}, password = #{password}, distributed = #{distributed}, pool_config = #{poolConfig}, remark = #{remark}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE sys_graph_connection SET name = #{name}, db_type = #{dbType}, jdbc_url = #{jdbcUrl}, username = #{username}, distributed = #{distributed}, pool_config = #{poolConfig}, remark = #{remark}, status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_graph_connection SET is_default = FALSE, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE is_default = TRUE
